title: acer negundo f. aureovariegatum
intro: Acer negundo f. aureovariegatum, also known as the variegated box elder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its distinctive yellow and green foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Acer negundo f. aureovariegatum are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and bark, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
